messages.content: I want you to remove everything before the # on each line including the #
Certainly, please provide me with the text you want to have this operation applied to, and I'll perform the task.

Router > enable
Router # configure terminal
Router(config) # hostname R1
R1(config) # no ip domain-lookup

R1(config) # interface Loopback0
R1(config-if) # ip address 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
R1(config-if) # exit

R1(config) # interface GigabitEthernet0/0
R1(config-if) # ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0

```
 configure terminal
 hostname R1
 no ip domain-lookup

 interface Loopback0
 ip address 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
 exit

 interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
```

R1(config-if) # no shutdown
R1(config-if) # exit
R1(config) # interface Serial0/0/0
R1(config) # clock rate 128000
R1(config-if) # ip address 192.168.12.1 255.255.255.252
R1(config-if) # no shutdown
R1(config-if) # exit

R1(config) # interface Serial0/0/1
R1(config-if) # ip address 192.168.13.1 255.255.255.252
R1(config-if) # no shutdown
R1(config-if) # end
R1 # copy run start

```
 no shutdown
 exit
 interface Serial0/0/0
 clock rate 128000
 ip address 192.168.12.1 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
 exit

 interface Serial0/0/1
 ip address 192.168.13.1 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
 end
 copy run start
```

# enable
Router # configure terminal
Router(config) # hostname R2
R2(config) # no ip domain-lookup

R2(config) # interface Loopback0
R2(config-if) # ip address 2.2.2.2 255.255.255.255
R2(config-if) # exit

R2(config) # interface GigabitEthernet0/0
R2(config-if) # ip address 192.168.2.1 255.255.255.0
R2(config-if) # no shutdown
R2(config-if) # exit
R2(config) # interface Serial0/0/0
R2(config-if) # ip address 192.168.12.2 255.255.255.252
R2(config-if) # no shutdown
R2(config-if) # exit

R2(config) # interface Serial0/0/1
R2(config) # clock rate 128000
R2(config-if) # ip address 192.168.23.1 255.255.255.252
R2(config-if) # no shutdown
R2(config-if) # end
R2 # copy run start

```
 configure terminal
 hostname R2
 no ip domain-lookup

 interface Loopback0
 ip address 2.2.2.2 255.255.255.255
 exit

 interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 192.168.2.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
 exit
 interface Serial0/0/0
 ip address 192.168.12.2 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
 exit

 interface Serial0/0/1
 clock rate 128000
 ip address 192.168.23.1 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
 end
 copy run start
```

Router # enable
Router # configure terminal
Router(config) # hostname R3
R3(config) # no ip domain-lookup

R3(config) # interface Loopback0
R3(config-if) # ip address 3.3.3.3 255.255.255.255
R2(config-if) # exit

R3(config) # interface GigabitEthernet0/0
R3(config-if) # ip address 192.168.3.1 255.255.255.0
R3(config-if) # no shutdown
R3(config-if) # exit
R3(config) # interface Serial0/0/0
R3(config) # clock rate 128000
R3(config-if) # ip address 192.168.13.2 255.255.255.252
R3(config-if) # no shutdown
R3(config-if) # exit

R3(config) # interface Serial0/0/1
R3(config-if) # ip address 192.168.23.2 255.255.255.252
R3(config-if) # no shutdown
R3(config-if) # end
R3 # copy run start

```
 configure terminal
 hostname R3
 no ip domain-lookup

 interface Loopback0
 ip address 3.3.3.3 255.255.255.255
 exit

 interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 192.168.3.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
 exit
 interface Serial0/0/0
 clock rate 128000
 ip address 192.168.13.2 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
 exit

 interface Serial0/0/1
 ip address 192.168.23.2 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
 end
 copy run start
```

R2(config-router)# network 192.168.2.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
R2(config-router)# network 192.168.12.0 0.0.0.3 area 0
R2(config-router)# network 192.168.23.0 0.0.0.3 area 0

R3(config-router)# network 192.168.3.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
R3(config-router)# network 192.168.13.0 0.0.0.3 area 0
R3(config-router)# network 192.168.23.0 0.0.0.3 area 0

R1(config)# interface lo0
R1(config-if)# ip address 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
R1(config-if)# end

```
 interface lo0
 ip address 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
 end
```

R1(config)# router ospf 1
R1(config-router)# router-id 11.11.11.11
R1(config)# end
R1# clear ip ospf process

```
router ospf 1
router-id 11.11.11.11
end
clear ip ospf process
```

R1(config)# router ospf 1
R1(config-router)# passive-interface g0/0

```
router ospf 1
passive-interface g0/0
```

R2(config)# router ospf 1
R2(config-router)# passive-interface default

```
router ospf 1
passive-interface default
```

R2(config)# router ospf 1
R2(config-router)# no passive-interface s0/0/0

```
router ospf 1
no passive-interface s0/0/0
```

R1(config)# router ospf 1
R1(config-router)# auto-cost reference-bandwidth 10000

```
router ospf 1
auto-cost reference-bandwidth 10000
```
